seoTitle: Tingha vs Tingira Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tingha and Tingira Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tingha vs Tingira Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tingha and Tingira Heights.
heading: Tingha vs Tingira Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tingha, New South Wales and Tingira Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tingira Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tingha (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tingha or Tingira Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tingha has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Tingira Heights scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tingha scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Tingira Heights scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tingha or Tingira Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tingira Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
